response.justification: While the candidate has extensive software development experience across multiple languages and domains, there is no evidence of professional C++ development on Windows or direct experience in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking — all mandatory requirements for the role. His C++ exposure is limited to an academic thesis and NI LabWindows, which does not meet the 5–10 year professional standard or domain context needed.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Demonstrated expertise in CI/CD, testing, and dev-ops practices
Active open-source contributor with technical communication skills
concerns: No professional C++ on Windows platform experience as required
Lacks any demonstrable fixed income, capital markets, or banking domain exposure
SQL experience is listed but not contextualized in financial systems or high-volume trading environments
